notes.note: These assertions could not be fully verified via curl against the mock test server (mock doesn't set isProcessing=true, has no active shells, and doesn't emit error/permission events). However, the gateway unit tests (65/65 passing) specifically cover these scenarios with properly configured mocks, confirming the implementation is correct.
Token/code expiry behavior verified via unit tests (auth.test.ts) since the running test server uses default TTLs that are too long to wait for.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Gateway Messaging Auth (curl)' section with auth token acquisition, isolation rules, mock behavior notes, and flow report paths
